rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reorganizing the content to improve flow and clarity.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, such as the generalizability of Fourier-feature results and the scope of the composite score.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, without any drift from the requested active set.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies potential issues in the original content, such as overclaiming the generalizability of results.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a source and reason, providing clear traceability.
